description: Your attack creates an opening that your allies can exploit. One ally that can hear you immediately makes an attack against the same target. That target is Off Guard 1 to this attack.
trigger: You successfully hit an enemy with an attack
bondEffect: The attack deals additional damage equal to the bond rank between you and the attacking ally.

description: Gain armor against the attack based on your metamorphosis skill rank and the amount of energy spent. Your next attack gains the trait of the element you absorbed with this technique, and deals additional damage equal to the amount of damage reduced.
trigger: You are damaged by an effect with an elemental tag

description: You leap at your enemy and unleash a rapid series of blows. Make a pair of unarmed strikes against a single target.. These attacks deal damage as if your Martial Arts rank was 1 lower. If your target is in the air, you gain a +1D circumstance bonus to these attacks. Otherwise, you take a -1D circumstance penalty instead.
You perform a takedown on a grappled target. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: both you and the target fall prone. The target is off-guard 1, and takes 5 damage at the beginning of each of their turns until you stand up or the grapple ends.

description: Make a melee attack with a 'Blunt' weapon. The attack has Armor Piercing 5.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is Stunned 1

description: You transform your hands into sharp claws, which you use to slash at your opponent. This attack does damage based on your Metamorphosis skill rank and the amount of energy spent.
Vines or tentacles reach out and wrap around the target.
onSuccess: The target is grappled. This grapple does not take one of your hands. A target grappled this way takes 4 damage at the beginning of each of their turns.
onCriticalSuccess: The target is also stunned 1 until the end of their turn.
notes: TODO: confirm immobilize/restrain effect from handbook.

description: You infuse the target with magical energy, bolstering their defensive abilities. The target gains a +1D status bonus to all defenses for the duration of the effect
trigger: When a creature within range is targeted by an attack
notes: TODO: fill exact effect/duration from handbook.

description: You attempt to manipulate the target’s emotional state, reducing its aggression towards you. If you are actively fighting the target, they get a +1D Circumstance bonus to their defense rolls against this technique.
onSuccess: the target is charmed by you for 1 minute.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is charmed by you for 1 hour instead.

description: With a broad sweeping strike, you attack two adjacent enemies in melee with a single swing. Choose two targets within your weapon’s reach that are next to each other. Make one basic weapon attack roll and apply the result to both targets.
You shoot a beam of bright light. The attack does damage based on your Spellcasting skill rank and the energy spent.
onSuccess: the target is Dazzled for 1 round.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is Dazzled for 1 minute
notes: Set skill to 'Class Skill' to support multiple sources (e.g., Magical Guardian vs Henshin Hero) granting the same technique.

description: You swing your weapon to deflect the attack away. Add your “Melee Weapons” Skill dice to the Defense roll.
trigger: When targeted by a ranged attack that targets your Physical Defense
notes: TODO: confirm trigger & mitigation from handbook.

description: Make a basic melee attack. You take a -2 penalty to the attack roll. Double the “Hits” for the purpose of calculating the attack’s damage.
You have a magical set of makeup that allows you to disguise yourself as another person. Details TBD.
You can choose a small number of people. For the duration of this spell, the members of that group can speak to each other at a distance. Details TBD.
onSuccess: You can choose a small number of people. For the duration of this spell, the members of that group can speak to each other at a distance. Details TBD.

description: You throw out a rapid series of strikes, designed not to injure but to misdirect and throw your opponent off balance.
onSuccess: the target is off-guard 1 until the end of the turn.
onCriticalSuccess: they are off-guard 2 instead.

description: You take on the appearance of a specific individual you have seen. If someone is familiar with that person, roll Primary (Metamorphosis) vs Mental Defense. On a success, they believe you are who you claim to be.
Make two separate attacks against two targets - each attack must be made with a different weapon. You do not suffer a repeated action penalty on these attack rolls.
prerequisites: Wielding 2 Melee Weapons - one in each hand.

description: You strike a heroic pose, shaking your enemy’s resolve.
onSuccess: the target suffers a -1D penalty on attack rolls until the end of their next turn.
onCriticalSuccess: they are also Frightened.

description:
You transform your fist into an elemental form and use it to strike your enemies. Roll a d8 to determine the chosen element. Your attack has that tag, and the attack modifiers of the chosen element.
Result/Element
1/Fire
2/Water
3/Earth
4/Air
5/Electricity
6/Ice
7/Metal
8/You Choose
notes: TODO: confirm element table/scaling from handbook.

description: You have the ability to share energy with others. You may touch one creature within range to either transfer your energy to them, or (if they are willing) you may receive energy from them instead. The amount of energy transferred can be any amount between 1 and your current energy.
bondEffect: The receiver gains additional energy equal to the rank of the bond between them and the sender.

description: Your transformation unleashes a huge amount of energy, which you can channel into an explosion of energy around you.
trigger: When you activate your Hero Transformation
onCriticalSuccess: targets are also Dazzled

description: You take advantage of your opponent’s opening and jab them in the eyes. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: If the target is off-guard, they are blinded until the end of their next turn.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is blinded until the end of their next turn.

description: Your allies share their energy with you, concentrating it all into a single beam of energy. This attack deals +2 damage for each adjacent ally. If an enemy is defeated by this attack they explode, dealing 5 damage in a 1 square burst around them.

Your allies all surround the enemy and attack at the same time. Any number of allied creatures you see may choose to move up to their speed towards the target of this attack, before you make the attack roll. Then, add +1D to this roll for every allied creature adjacent to the target (not including yourself).

You exploit an opening, and unleash a flurry of rapid strikes against your enemy. Make a pair of unarmed strikes against a single target. These attacks deal damage as if your Martial Arts rank was 1 lower.
Leap up to half your movement speed in any direction (including vertically), and make an unarmed strike against a target within range.

targets: 1 Target (who is no more than 1 scale larger than you)
onSuccess: the target is grappled.

description: You surround a creature with a Bubble of protective energy that absorbs damage. This bubble can appear to be made of soap film, glowing energy, hard candy coating, or any number of other materials. The creature gains wards based on your Spellcasting Skill rank and the energy spent.
trigger: When a creature within range is hit by an attack

description: You may redirect the attack to yourself instead. If you do, you may immediately make an unarmed strike against the attacking creature.
trigger: When an enemy within your reach would make an attack against an ally (not you)

description: The target restores 9 + Hits HP.
bondEffect: Grant an additional 1 HP for each bond rank with the target

description: You and any number of allies that can hear you may choose to shout out your names (or your heroic codenames). If an ally chooses to participate in this “Roll Call”, your Bond Rank with that ally is treated as 1 Rank higher until the end of combat (or 10 minutes). If you use this ability again, the benefits of any previous Roll Call end.
sourceNote: henshin-hero L3 'Hero Roll Call (1 Action + 3 Energy)'

description: You can throw a grappled target forcefully to the ground.
onSuccess: the target is thrown 1 square and knocked prone.
onCriticalSuccess: they are thrown up to 2 squares instead. They take falling damage based on the distance thrown.

description: Your training allows you to block attacks with weapons that weren’t designed for it. Add your Melee Weapon Skill Dice to the Defense Roll.
trigger: You are targeted by a melee attack vs your physical defense.

description: You channel all of your fists to perform a devastating final strike.
Make a melee attack against the triggering creature. If the attack hits, the creature's movement immediately ends.
trigger: A creature attempts to move into a space within your weapon's reach.
onSuccess: The creature's movement ends.
prerequisites: Melee weapon with reach +1 or higher

description: Channeling the spirit of highly trained warriors, you can adapt to any fighting style. You may make an "Analyze Enemy" investigation action against the triggering creature.
trigger: When you critically fail an attack against an enemy.

description: You move forward up to half your speed in a straight line. You can move through other creatures during this movement, but cannot end the movement in another creature’s space. Make aa basic weapon attack against each creature whose space you move through.
You mark your enemies with a symbol of bad luck.
onSuccess: each target takes a -½D Status penalty to all skill checks for the duration.

description: You make 1 attack with a melee weapon. You quickly lunge forward, increasing the reach of that weapon by 1 square for this attack.
notes: TODO: confirm movement/strike effect from handbook.

description: You can magically move objects at a distance. Details TBD.
The target becomes "Marked" as your prey. Your attacks against the marked creature deal +3 damage. If you attempt to use this ability and already have a creature marked, the previous mark ends.
The creature drops to 1 HP instead, and gains wards equal to 5 times your bond level. Once you use this reaction, you can’t use it again until you take a short rest.
trigger: A creature in your aura would be defeated (drop to 0 HP)

description: You finish your combo with a leaping, two-legged kick, sending yourself and your target flying in opposite directions. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: you push the target directly away from you a number of squares equal to half your strength, and you move the same distance in the opposite direction.
onCriticalSuccess: the distance is up to your full strength instead.

description: Make a basic ranged attack. If the attack succeeds, the projectile continues in a straight line (up to its range). If there is another creature in that line, roll another attack against them (repeated action penalty applies).
Alternative Use - Pin: Rather than harming your enemy directly, you aim to restrict their movement. If you spend 3 energy while making a basic attack, you can Pin as part of that attack.
onSuccess: the target is immobilized until they use an action to free themselves.
onCriticalSuccess: they are also stunned 1.
prerequisites: Sharp weapon that is Ranged or Thrown

damage: 5 + Hits to all creatures in the area

description: You parry the attack, granting a +3D bonus to their defense roll.
trigger: When an adjacent ally is targeted by a melee attack vs their physical defense.

description: Any number of allied creatures within range can immediately move up to half their speed.
onSuccess: Range 10 Any number of allied creatures within range can immediately move up to half their speed.

description: You grab the target with magically unfused ribbons, dealing damage and slowing their movement.
onSuccess: the target is immobilized until the end of its next turn.
onCriticalSuccess: they are also Stunned 1.

description: You have mastered the art of throwing a weapon in such a way that it bounces back into your hand.
trigger: You succeed on an attack with a thrown weapon
notes: TODO: confirm trigger/weapon requirement from handbook.

description: You focus all your power into your legs, allowing you to leap up to half your speed (including vertically), then slamming down with a devastating kick.
onSuccess: target is pushed 2 squares
onCriticalSuccess: they are also knocked prone.

description: You unleash a powerful uppercut, knocking your opponent into the air. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: the target is knocked into the air a number of squares equal to half your strength
onCriticalSuccess: the target is knocked into the air a number of squares equal to your strength

description: You transform a limb into a stretchy, rubbery material, allowing you to punch or kick from a further distance. This attack does damage based on your Metamorphosis skill rank. For each energy you spend on this attack, increase the Reach by 1.
You bite your target with powerful, beastlike jaws.
onSuccess: The target is bleeding 2
onCriticalSuccess: The target is bleeding 4

description: You strike your target with full effort, dealing increased damage.
You deliver a precise strike to an enemy’s nerves, lashing like a venomous snake. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: the target becomes "Poisoned N", where N is half your hits.
onCriticalSuccess: N is equal to your Full Hits instead.

onSuccess: push the target in a straight line a number of squares up to the difference between the Hits and the target’s defense (min 1).

description: You sprinkle magical dust around the area, creating a cloud that induces drowsiness.
onSuccess: The target is stunned 2 (defense roll ends)
onCriticalSuccess: the target falls unconscious.
onFailure: the target is stunned 1 for 1 round.

description: Make a basic ranged attack.
onSuccess: The target's speed is also halved until the end of their next turn.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is immobilized until the end of their next turn.

description: You make an attack against an object. You destroy a section of the object no larger than a 5 foot cube.
notes: TODO: confirm object HP/damage rules from handbook.
TODO: confirm teleport distance/conditions from handbook.

description: You mark your allies with a symbol of good fortune. Each ally gains a +½ D status bonus to all skill checks for the duration.

You speak calming words, helping to restore your allies.
Choose one of the following:
* If the creature has a persistent damage condition (e.g. burning, poisoned, bleeding), roll your primary attribute and reduce the condition by “Hits”.
* If they have a condition that ends on a successful defense roll, they immediately make a new defense roll with a +1D status bonus.
bondEffect: If you have a bond with the creature, add +1 hit to the first option for each bond rank. For the second option, they gain an additional +1D bonus to their defense roll.

description: You shoot a beam of bright light. The attack does damage based on your Henshin Arts skill rank and the energy spent.
onSuccess: Target is Dazzled for 1 round
onCriticalSuccess: Target is Dazzled for 1 Minute

description: You channel your spirit energy through your fists, and unleash in a ranged strike. This attack does damage based on your Martial Arts skill rank and the amount of energy spent. You must spend at least 1 energy to perform this technique.
You have a pair of magical sunglasses. When you wear them, you can see traces of spirit energy that are normally invisible to the naked eye. Details TBD.
Make a single basic thrown attack and apply it to all targets in the area.
range: A 2 by 2 square area within the weapon's thrown range.

description: You have a magical staff or other device that emits light. Details TBD.
You shoot a ranged blast of concentrated magical energy. This blast does damage based on your Spellcasting Skill rank and the amount of energy spent.
You switch places with an inanimate object (such as a log or straw dummy), avoiding the attack and teleporting up to half your movement speed.
trigger: When an enemy would hit you with an attack.

description: You sweep your opponents legs and send them crashing down. Make an unarmed strike.
onSuccess: the target is knocked prone.

description: Your hands transform into a mundane scale -2 object, such as a magnifying glass or a lockpick. This object can have simple mechanical components. While transformed in this way, if the object would be beneficial to a skill check, you gain a +1D equipment bonus to that check.
If the creature does not have the “Monster” tag, they automatically succeed on their defense roll against this ability. This effect ends if you take any hostile actions towards the creature
onSuccess: The creature's attitude towards you increases by 1 stage (e.g. from Hostile to Neutral, or Neutral to Friendly).
onCriticalSuccess: The creature's attitude towards you becomes friendly, and it is willing to fight for you.
notes: If the creature does not have the "Monster" tag, they automatically succeed in their defense roll against this technique. Effect ends if you or your allies take hostile actions towards the creature.

description: Make an unarmed strike or basic weapon attack against the target.
onSuccess: the target is taunted by you until the end of the turn.
onCriticalSuccess: they are taunted by you (Defense Roll Ends).

description: With a double-fisted smash, you drive your opponent down to the ground. Make an unarmed strike against an airborne enemy.
onSuccess: the target immediately falls to the ground and takes falling damage.
onCriticalSuccess: the target takes double the normal falling damage and is prone.

description: Increment your power die. Your scale increases by 1. Your Titan Form can stack with your Metamorphic Transformations. This form lasts until the end of the combat, or until you choose to end it (no action required). Once you activate your Titan Form, you cannot do so again until you take a short rest.
You make a basic punch, kick, or other unarmed attack against your enemy. This attack does damage based on your Martial Arts skill rank and the amount of energy spent.
Make a melee attack with a 'Sharp' weapon.
onSuccess: the target is also bleeding 2
onCriticalSuccess: the target is also bleeding 4

description: You make an “Analyze Enemy” action against a creature you can see. Depending on how much energy you spend, your next attack against the scanned enemy deals additional damage.
You have a magical set of paints and a paintbrush that can be used to create minor illusions. Details TBD. Mental Defense roll to be tricked by the illusion?
Execute a spinning kick to strike all adjacent enemies. Make an unarmed strike against any number of adjacent targets.
onCriticalSuccess: the target is also pushed back 1 square.
notes: TODO: confirm AoE shape/damage from handbook.
